mapper.select: select * from hy_dict_item where typecode = #{typeCode} and status='0' order by sort
select (IFNULL(max(sort),0)+1) as sort from hy_dict_item where typecode = #{typeCode}
select * from hy_dict_item where status='0' order by typecode,sort
select * from hy_dict_item where typecode = #{typeCode} and value = #{code}
mapper.insert:
insert into hy_dict_item ( id, sort, text, value, typecode, status, bz )values( #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{text,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{value,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{typeCode,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
)
